transcript.content: 你在 Codex 里验证，别先看单测，先看这 3 组结果。 **1. 看默认诊断有没有变轻** 在仓库根目录跑：
能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the Codex context-size visibility feature inside VS Code. Earlier diagnostic/test discussion is no longer relevant. The user wants a built-in, continuously updating visual display reachable from the status bar or a live editor/terminal surface without manual refresh or commands. A later implementation touched Project Assistant host code, and the user explicitly rejected that boundary crossing: future work must be isolated and must not modify Project Assistant.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a constraint on the same active implementation topic, so relation=continue. Keep recent raw turns that explain the boundary issue and current feature direction, especially the requirement for direct auto-updating display and the explanation that prior work used Project Assistant code. Evict the old testing/diagnostic setup and the command-based display suggestion because they are solved or superseded. Preserve the core product requirements as semantic pins because they are durable constraints even if some older raw turns later leave the prompt.
